ground_truth.title: Catering
ground_truth.main_content: Catering news and expert commentary from Special Events. Featured: Cultural Immersion: How Constellation Brought Día de los Muertos Magic to Miami's Corporate Scene - Constellation Culinary Group catered an extraordinary Día de los Muertos–themed Halloween celebration at Miami Beach's iconic Temple House. The October 2024 event successfully fulfilled the client's vision of fostering cross-team connections while immersing guests in Mexican traditions that form an integral part of Miami's cultural fabric. Latest articles include: Custom Cocktail Menus: Tips from Event Mixologists - Crafting custom cocktail menus requires thoughtful planning and expert execution; A Spotlight on Summer Catering Trends - As we approach the summer season, we examine the latest trends shaping catering menus across the country; A Match Made In Heaven - When it comes to event planning, pairing the right food with the right beverage can transform an ordinary gathering into an extraordinary experience.
